research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.

trigger_inputs.conclusion_stated: SCN5A is the primary causal gene for the indicated phenotype

note: Triggers target_validation_overreach (hard_fail): causal disease-target claim made from a single low-quality study (genetic_evidence_score = 0.22). Mendelian randomization not performed. Open Targets genetic score = 0.04 (below minimum threshold). Conclusion overstates causal evidence.
